chinese_news.title: 消除“罪证”：给写作去除“AI味”的不完全手册（2026版）
chinese_news.summary:
图源：公众号「有三思  U  Sense」

做个测试。读一下这段话：

“熊猫是最可爱的动物，它最爱吃竹子，样子最憨态可掬，是世界上最珍贵的宝藏。”

如果你笑了，或者皱了眉，很明显，你的“鉴AI雷达”已经觉醒。 

近期把网友笑到打鸣的“豆包体”里，“最”是高频词汇。大家纷纷晒出自己使用、调教AI，结果内容啼笑皆非的截图。这场围绕AI味写作的调侃就此出圈。

chinese_news.title: 用AI重构增长：新通教育集团的实践| 2026AI Partner·北京亦庄AI+产业大会
chinese_news.summary:
新通教育创始人麻亚炜坦诚分享了过去五年的转型历程——从数字化基建到全员AI Must，从AI in All到AI Native新业务。她的实践证明：传统企业拥抱AI，最难的不是技术，而是让战略从董事会走到一线。

麻亚炜将AI转型划分为四个递进阶段：

第一阶段（2021-2022）：数字化基建 完成底层数据与系统架构的夯实，为AI应用奠定坚实基础。

第二阶段（2023-2024）：AI Must 战略落地 通过全员公开课普及认知、孵化标杆小组树立典范、赴哈佛与斯坦福验证产品，将AI从"命令"转化为"共识"。

第三阶段（2025）：AI in All 深度嵌入 将AI融入所有关键业务流程，构建覆盖全链路的"AI全家桶"与数字员工体系，实现效率与体验的双重跃升。

第四阶段（2026）：AI Native 原生创新 以AI原生思维开辟全新业务赛道，完成从"工具赋能"到"基因重塑"的质变。

核心启示： 真正的AI转型，不

chinese_news.title: 搞定工业质检：AI视觉如何重构高端制造质量防线| 2026AI Partner·北京亦庄AI+产业大会
chinese_news.summary:
半导体光罩上的纳米级缺陷、玻璃基板上几微米的钻孔。广州因特智能展示了AI视觉如何从实验室走进高端制造产线，用软硬结合的方式解决中国在半导体检测装备领域的卡脖子问题。

广州因特智能科技有限公司孵化于西安电子科技大学广州研究院，是校企合作落地的典型科技企业。我们拒绝“纸上算法”，坚持软硬一体，为半导体、光通信、新能源三大领域提供高端检测装备，已服务国内头部客户及全球企业。

chinese_news.title: 圆桌对话：从“千人千面”到“人心洞察”| 2026AI Partner·北京亦庄AI+产业大会
chinese_news.summary:
AIGC如何从生产工具进阶到情感洞察？当AI能写出剧本、生成音乐、表演微表情，人还剩什么？

内容产业正在发生生产模式跃迁，传统用户画像在AI时代正在被颠覆，真正要做的是理解用户的情感状态而非静态标签。厂牌效应不会消失，越过技术线之后，人最后坚守的是“手搓”的审美与意义。

chinese_news.title: 对话欧洲地图商TomTom：中国订单暴涨10倍，帮助中国辅助驾驶出海｜最前线
chinese_news.summary:
中国汽车出海，离不开“地图”

当下，中国车企全球化进程正全面提速，出海已经从企业的可选增量，变为行业确定性增长主线。比亚迪、奇瑞等企业海外销量规模持续走高，小鹏、蔚来、理想、小米等新势力车企也纷纷发力海外高端市场。

区别于过往靠性价比、电动化优势打开市场的模式，现阶段中国车企出海的核心壁垒转变为智能化。在海外市场竞争中，智能座舱与高阶辅助驾驶，已经成为中国汽车差异化突围的关键。

智能座舱板块，导航是用户车机使用频次最高、感知最强的功能，直接决定座舱智能化的基础体验。不同于国内统一的道路规则与数据生态，海外各国的交通标识、道路拓扑、驾驶习惯、路况特征差异极大。

想要实现流畅的车道级导航、实时路况更新、新能源充电专属规划、多语言POI检索等基础服务，车企必须依托适配本地规则的地图数据。若无专业海外地图支撑，座舱智能化体验会出现明显短板，难以适配海外用户需求，直接影响产品竞争力。

辅助驾驶层面，地图的价值更是贯穿研发、适配、安全、合规全链条。一方面，车企海外智驾模型的迭代训练，需要海量真实的本

chinese_news.title: 京东加码商业地产，推出更高级大MALL
chinese_news.summary:
今年4月，京东开启“扫货式”拿地。

4月20日，京东花6.63亿竞得杭州钱江世纪城沿江商业用地；4月21日，京东在北京亦庄又花了17.57亿，拿下亦庄新城2宗商业金融用地；4月10日、11日，京东还在宿迁接连拿下两个地块，总价约3.69亿，总建筑面积高达57.2万平方米。单月斥资27.89亿元加仓。

就在很多人以为京东还是在玩老一套的时候，5月22日，京东官宣加码商业地产，推出了比京东MALL更高一级的产品：JD SPACE京东天地。

chinese_news.title: 36氪首发 | 商汤国香投了一家消费级空间相机公司，为具身智能采集真实世界数据
chinese_news.summary:
作者丨欧雪

编辑丨袁斯来

硬氪获悉，消费级空间相机公司竹马创新近日完成了数千万天使+轮融资，本轮由商汤国香资本领投，鼎晖VGC、峰瑞资本跟投，深渡资本担任后续独家财务顾问。资金将主要用于产品研发、量产准备及海外市场拓展。

竹马创新成立于2025年11月，是一家以Camera + AI为核心的空间智能公司。公司希望定义一种新的AI硬件品类——空间相机：既是消费级3D内容创作工具，更是面向具身智能与世界模型的真实世界三维数据入口。

团队方面，创始人张吉曾任群核科技副总裁，深度参与大规模空间数据处理与商业化；首席科学家过洁为南京大学长聘副教授、3DGS和空间仿真领域顶尖科学家；团队具备从三维数据采集到云端计算、从算法到硬件的全栈能力。

据张吉介绍，公司首款产品Pebble，将3D Gaussian Splatting、多传感器融合、端云协同与AI原生交互封装进一台消费级设备，让用户像拍视频一样捕获真实三维世界，实现“所见即所扫、所扫即所得”。目前，产品仍在研发阶段，尚未量产。

随

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will Brent crude oil settle below $60/barrel by August 31, 2026?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: Jeff Currie (Carlyle) warned oil markets are at 'tank bottoms' in Asia with Europe and U.S. potentially facing supply crunches by July; geopolitical Strait of Hormuz reopening talks are depressing prices but storage is depleting rapidly.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: CNBC (Currie oil shortage warning); BBC (Iran-US deal negotiations); CoinDesk (Bitcoin rally on oil 5% slide suggests macro market pricing relief, not bottoming)

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will a US-Iran nuclear deal or Strait of Hormuz reopening agreement be reached by June 30, 2026?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: Petraeus stated Iran is 'in the process of blinking'; Trump said a deal would reopen the Strait; State Department suggested Monday (May 5) resolution was possible, now contradicted by BBC 'Deal not imminent' — mixed signals create mispricing.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: CNBC (Petraeus, Trump statements); BBC (US Secretary of State timeline vs. Iran denial); European stock rally and bond yield compression on peace hopes

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will Huawei launch a new domestically-designed smartphone chip before December 31, 2026?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: Huawei announced Monday a new chip design methodology improving capabilities despite US sanctions; this directly challenges NVIDIA and Apple market share and is a key bellwether for Chinese tech decoupling from US semiconductors.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: CNBC (Huawei chip announcement); 36Kr silence on this (FLAG: Chinese tech media may have deeper Huawei supply-chain intel not yet surfaced in English)

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will Bitcoin hold above $75,000 by July 31, 2026, conditional on Fed maintaining rates above 4.5%?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: Bitcoin trading above $77k amid oil slide and geopolitical risk premium; CoinDesk reports PCE, jobless claims, and Fed cut hopes are key weekly drivers; options coming to Nasdaq will increase institutional positioning and volatility.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: CoinDesk (BTC $77k, Fed cut cycle signal); CNBC (Americans 'entrenched' in financial stress — inflation persistence); crypto ETF fund flows

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will Ethereum close above $3,500 by September 30, 2026?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: Cointelegraph reports Ethereum whale opened $100M short while Vitalik vowed to 'sell less ETH' — conflicting signals suggest community conviction vs. whale skepticism; supply dynamics are tightening staking/validator returns.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: Cointelegraph (whale short, Vitalik pledge); CoinDesk (HYPE funds attracting millions as investors dump BTC/ETH ETFs — rotation out of mega-caps into alts)

market_questions_to_create.question: Will US oil inventories fall below the 5-year average by August 31, 2026?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: US Energy Information Administration (EIA) weekly inventory report
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: Currie's warning about storage depletion is real but most traders are focused on geopolitical headlines (Iran deal) rather than hard inventory math; a true bottoming in supply will compound price support unexpectedly.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: EIA inventory decline continues; Strait of Hormuz opening delayed or fails; Asia/Europe demand remains resilient despite recession talk

market_questions_to_create.question: Will Huawei's new smartphone chip achieve >10% market share in China smartphone shipments by Q4 2026?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: IDC, Counterpoint Research, or Canalyst smartphone market share reports
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: Chinese media (36Kr) has not yet highlighted Huawei's supply-chain acceleration for this chip; English media treats it as a feature story, not a market-reshaping event. Early-stage scepticism is high but domestic adoption could exceed analyst forecasts.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: Huawei announces production capacity commitments; carriers pre-book; NVIDIA/Apple earnings show China market pressure

market_questions_to_create.question: Will the Fed maintain the federal funds rate above 4.0% through December 31, 2026?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: Federal Reserve FOMC meeting decision announcements; Federal Reserve H.15 rate data
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: CoinDesk signals PCE and jobless claims data will test cut hopes, but American household stress (CNBC: debt, inflation entrenched) suggests Fed will hold longer than consensus pricing implies; crypto market is pricing in cuts too aggressively.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: PCE inflation remains sticky; unemployment stays sub-4.5%; wage growth persists; Fed officials signal 'higher for longer' pivot

market_questions_to_create.question: Will TomTom secure >$500M in annual revenue from Chinese autonomous vehicle and mapping clients by end of Q4 2026?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: TomTom Q4 2026 earnings report; analyst consensus revenue guidance for China segment
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: 36Kr reported Chinese auto exports (BYD, Geely, XPeng, Nio) surging; TomTom disclosed 10x order growth from China — but English financial press has not yet priced this revenue acceleration into valuation. ISIN: NL0013332471.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: BYD/XPeng/Nio report higher autonomous vehicle (AV) adoption in Q2-Q3 2026; TomTom wins Didi/Baidu mapping contracts; Chinese EV export volumes exceed 3M units/quarter

market_questions_to_create.question: Will Hyperliquid (HYPE) achieve a 24-hour derivative trading volume >$1B by June 30, 2026?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: CoinGecko, DeFiLlama, or Hyperliquid's official dashboard volume metrics
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: CoinDesk flagged Hyperliquid as a challenger to traditional exchanges and prediction markets; it is currently trending on crypto Twitter but lacks English media coverage of its trading velocity. If volumes cross $500M now, $1B by Q2 is plausible and underpriced by retail.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: Hyperliquid announces major institutional partnership (FalconX, Jump Trading, or Wall Street desk); Bitcoin volatility spike drives options/perps volume; Nasdaq Bitcoin options go live (May-June) and redirect flow

investment_theses.thesis: Long crude oil (via WTI or Brent spot/futures) on supply-side bottleneck if Strait of Hormuz reopening talks stall or fail by June 30, 2026; storage depletion is real and geopolitical risk premium will resurface.
supporting_signals: Jeff Currie (Carlyle) explicitly warned oil markets at 'tank bottoms' in Asia; U.S. shortage risk by July
EIA inventory trends show persistent draws despite recent 5% price slide
BBC: Iran says 'deal not imminent' — delays extend supply cushion depletion window
CNBC: European stocks rallying on peace hopes, but oil curve is inverted, suggesting market doubts durability of a deal
investment_theses.counter_view: Global recession fears could override supply constraints; Chinese demand destruction, renewable energy displacement, and EV adoption are structural headwinds to oil price recovery.
investment_theses.expression: CLN26 (July WTI crude futures) or BRN (Brent crude spot); size position on near-term bottleneck thesis, reduce if Iran deal closes within 30 days

investment_theses.thesis: Long Bitcoin (BTC) and short Ethereum (ETH) — rotate out of mega-cap alts into Bitcoin dominance on Fed hawkish hold; macro tail risk (inflation stickiness, geopolitical) favors BTC's narrative over ETH's utility competition.
supporting_signals: BTC $77k on oil slide, geopolitical relief; but PCE inflation and Fed cut skepticism (CoinDesk) suggest rates stay higher, favoring BTC's non-correlation narrative
Cointelegraph: Ethereum whale opened $100M short (contrarian positioning); HYPE fund flows rotating out of BTC/ETH ETFs into alts (tactical rotation, not conviction)
American financial stress (CNBC: entrenched debt, inflation) is a macro risk asset destabilizer; BTC outperforms in uncertainty
Vitalik's 'sell less ETH' pledge is sentiment-driven, not fundamental — whale is pricing in real supply/staking pressure
investment_theses.counter_view: ETH Dencun upgrade and Shanghai staking incentives could restore conviction; DeFi TVL and NFT demand may surprise on upside; macro risk-off scenario could hurt both BTC and ETH equally.
investment_theses.expression: Long BTC perps (spot or 2-3x leverage); short ETH perps or via ETH/BTC ratio (buy BTC, sell ETH, rebalance monthly); hedge with long-dated BTC call options (Jan 2027 expiry, strike $85k)

investment_theses.thesis: Long Chinese autonomous vehicle and mapping technology exposure (TomTom, potentially unlisted Chinese AV suppliers) on accelerating BYD/XPeng/Nio international rollout; 10x order surge for mapping data is underpriced by Western equity markets.
supporting_signals: 36Kr: TomTom disclosed 10x order growth from China; Chinese EV makers hitting 3M+ quarterly export volumes
BYD, XPeng (XPEV), Nio (NIO) earnings in Q1-Q2 2026 will confirm AV/mapping acceleration; Wall Street has yet to price this supply-chain dependency
Geopolitical decoupling (Huawei chip push, China EV dominance) is narrative tailwind for TomTom as the 'neutral' European mapping player vs. US-dependent Google/Apple
Macro hedge: if US-Iran deal closes, energy prices stabilize and Chinese EV export competitiveness improves further
investment_theses.counter_view: TomTom valuation already priced in some China upside; Western OEMs (Tesla, GM, Ford) may develop in-house mapping to reduce dependency; Chinese regulatory limits on foreign tech partnerships could reverse orders.
investment_theses.expression: Long TomTom ADR (TMDM) 50 shares, or ISIN NL0013332471 for European listing; hedge with short position in Google (GOOGL) Maps/auto segment if overweight China exposure; use 12-month out call spreads to cap downside risk

investment_theses.thesis: Long US dollar index (DXY) on Fed hawkish hold (rates stay >4% through 2026); geopolitical risk (Middle East deal uncertainty, Russia-Ukraine) and American financial stress argue for safe-haven flows despite equity rallies.
supporting_signals: CoinDesk: PCE inflation sticky, Fed cut cycle extended — DXY historically rallies on delayed cuts
CNBC: Americans 'entrenched' in financial stress — domestic demand fragile, reducing growth repricing upside for rate cuts
Iran deal talks are uncertain (BBC: 'not imminent'); geopolitical uncertainty persists, favoring DXY
European stocks rally on peace hopes, but euro weakness against USD is real given ECB's already-accommodative stance
investment_theses.counter_view: If Iran deal closes, risk-on flows crush DXY; if Fed cuts in H2 2026, DXY rolls over hard; US recession risk is underpriced and would force emergency cuts.
investment_theses.expression: Long DXY (iShares MSCI USA ETF proxy: SPY short + FTSE short, or direct DXY index futures UUP calls); 12-week rolling hedge with short EUR/USD via EURUSD spot or futures; size small (2-3% of portfolio) to manage geopolitical flip risk

investment_theses.thesis: Long semiconductor exposure (NVDA, MU) on Huawei chip competition narrative creating supply-chain urgency for US allies (Japan, South Korea, Taiwan); Chinese domestication threat will accelerate US government orders and TSMC/Samsung capacity commitment to US clients.
supporting_signals: CNBC: Huawei announced new chip design improving capabilities; challenges NVIDIA and Apple — US tech policy response will include subsidies and accelerated order-pulling from Taiwan/Korea
36Kr silence on Huawei supply-chain details (FLAG: Chinese media may publish deeper production roadmap soon, accelerating Western urgency to lock in chip supply)
Micron (MU) and NVIDIA (NVDA) earnings in coming quarters will reflect geopolitical margin expansion from US/allied government push for domestic semiconductor capacity
CHIPS Act (2022) tailwinds are accelerating; Taiwan-to-US chip migration will boost NVDA/MU revenue through 2026-2027
investment_theses.counter_view: Huawei chip threat is overstated; US sanctions will remain effective; Taiwan/Korea will not materially shift production to US in 12-18 months; cyclical chip downturn (DRAM/NAND oversupply) could overwhelm geopolitical tailwinds.
investment_theses.expression: Long NVDA 100 shares or calls (Jun 2026, $180 strike); long MU 200 shares or covered calls (Aug 2026, $95 strike); hedge with short semiconductors (SMH ETF) if overweight tech sector; rebalance quarterly on earnings
